title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
The Mastercard Platinum Debit Card reinforces IDBI Bank’s commitment to premium banking by delivering more than just seamless transactions. It offers an exclusive blend of lifestyle privileges, travel conveniences, and enhanced security features—creating a superior experience for customers.
IDBI Mastercard Platinum Debit Card offers 2 free visits per calendar quarter at participating Airport Lounges in India. For List of participating lounges please visit: 
The Mastercard Platinum Debit Card offers seamless usage both in India and abroad. Customers can make purchases at merchant outlets and withdraw local currency from ATMs worldwide. All transactions are debited in Indian Rupees (INR) and reflected in the account statement in INR, along with detailed merchant location information.
The Mastercard Platinum Debit Card can be used online, for shopping, booking air/rail/movie tickets & utility bill payments.
Simply wave/tap the card on the contactless Point of Sale (POS) and pay without entering PIN for purchases up to Rs. 5000.
Customers will gain 2 loyalty point for every Rs. 100 spent on the Debit Card.
_#Loyalty point reward structure as well as reward of loyalty points for different merchant categories is subject to revision from time to time._
In addition to insurance cover for lost/stolen/Counterfeit cards, you can avail of following insurance covers:
  * Fire and Burglary for House Hold Contents - Rs. 50,000

_# Please keep your card active to continue enjoying seamless transactions and benefits._  
*Fee depends upon SOF of Scheme code of account under which account is opened.
As Mastercard Platinum Debit Card are issued on the basis of account opening form, if you have not opted for card while opening the account and would like to avail the same, for further details.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)
